onset: suddenly after lifting a heavy object
pain_location: front and outer part of the shoulder, sometimes radiating down the arm
pain_nature: sharp during movement, deep throbbing ache at rest, accompanied by weakness and tingling sensations
previous_history: no previous shoulder injuries or surgeries in the past
functional_limitations: significant difficulty lifting the arm, reaching overhead, or performing basic activities like dressing or carrying items
red_flags: weakness in the arm and occasional tingling sensations, swelling around the joint, slight feeling of warmth
additional_notes: concerned about possible rotator cuff tear or ligament injury, seeking proper diagnosis and treatment
